title: mldsa_round_trip integration test has no independent oracle
description: The mldsa_round_trip test signs a message with wolfHSM and verifies it with wolfHSM. The test comment explicitly notes '(no independent oracle)'. This violates the codebase's documented test design constraint (CLAUDE.md: 'A test that encrypts with function A and decrypts with function A proves nothing'). An ML-DSA implementation bug that consistently produces and accepts invalid signatures will pass this test. This pattern will also be copied by contributors adding future PQC algorithms, anchoring a weak test pattern in the codebase.
